content:
Hey! Early February we've received an announcement regarding the virtual Plumbers Summit.

That is tomorrow. Is there already more info on how to join, etc?

there's a channel for it over here: #Events > Plumbers Summit - February 2026

(see you tomorrow!)
Also info in our meetings repo here, including agenda, but the Zulip topic is the place to follow including live during the event. (See you tomorrow!)
